title: Filipino Chicken Adobo
description: A classic Filipino dish made with marinated chicken cooked in vinegar, soy sauce, garlic, and bay leaves.

ingredients.name: vinegar
ingredients.notes: apple cider vinegar or white vinegar

instructions: Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add garlic and sauté until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add chicken and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add vinegar, soy sauce, bay leaves, black pepper, and salt.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, until chicken is cooked through, about 20-25 minutes.
Remove chicken from sauce and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Strain sauce and discard bay leaves.
Serve chicken with sauce spooned over the top.
